title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ
scenario: Custom EQ settings fail to update when re-saving modified values in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on a custom EQ preset slot (e.g., Custom 1).
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders to new positions.
Tap the 'Save EQ' button (or equivalent save action).
Exit the Equalizer screen and return to Audio Settings.
Re-enter Audio Settings → Equalizer and select the same custom EQ preset.
expected: The custom EQ preset retains the newly adjusted slider positions after saving and re-opening the Equalizer screen.
